name: ⌜꩜: MHA ⌟
description:
PLUS ULTRA!

— WELCOME TO THE WORLD OF HEROES —

The era of peace is a fragile illusion. In a world where 80% of the population possesses a 'Quirk,' the line between a Symbol of Hope and a Harbinger of Chaos is razor-thin.

"Whether you are a student at U.A. High, a Pro Hero patrolling the streets, or a Villain looking to dismantle the status quo, your story begins here."

DEFINE YOUR QUIRK. CHOOSE YOUR SIDE.
THE NEXT GENERATION IS WATCHING.
